column1: ]633;E;{   printf 'original_path\\tcloud_path\\n'\x3b   find "$BASE" -type f -name '*.csv' | sort | while read -r p\x3b do     rel=${p#"$BASE"/}\x3b     case "$rel" in       root/*)         orig="outputs/${rel#root/}"\x3b         \x3b\x3b       root_h1_per_seed/*)         orig="outputs/${rel#root_h1_per_seed/}"\x3b         \x3b\x3b       p0_stabilization/*)         orig="outputs/p0_stabilization/${rel#p0_stabilization/}"\x3b         \x3b\x3b       *)         continue\x3b         \x3b\x3b     esac\x3b     printf '%s\\t%s\\n' "$orig" "$p"\x3b   done\x3b } > "$MANIFEST";079e4c8e-3f5d-4876-8085-42d1bf9a9c1c]633;Coriginal_path
